summary: Design System Centralization verification complete. All backend APIs (24/24) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Design tokens from design-system.css properly applied across all pages.
critical_code_review_comments: Design system centralization successfully implemented with --jp- prefix CSS variables
All pages consistently use jp-btn, jp-input, jp-card, jp-badge, jp-table, jp-tabs classes
Forest Green (#1B4332) correctly applied to primary buttons and balance card
Terracotta (#E07A5F) correctly applied to secondary buttons (Retirer) and MESSENGER subtitle
Profile page gradient cover transitions from Forest Green to Terracotta
Transaction status badges use jp-badge-success (Termine) and jp-badge-warning (En attente)
Admin stat cards have colored icon backgrounds using design token variables

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI flows working, design system applied correctly)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Design system centralization verified. All pages use centralized CSS tokens from design-system.css. Key classes: jp-btn-primary (Forest Green), jp-btn-secondary (Terracotta), jp-card-primary (Forest Green balance card), jp-badge-success/warning/error for status badges. All wallet flows (deposit, withdraw, send) working. Admin dashboard shows 8 stat cards with colored icons.

chat_page.sidebar: ✓ JAPAP logo with MESSENGER in Terracotta

tests_executed.backend_api_tests: 24/24 passed - All auth, wallet, messaging, admin, user endpoints working
frontend_ui_tests: Login page loads with Forest Green CTA button
Admin login with admin@japap.com / JapapAdmin2024! works
Chat page renders with sidebar, conversation list, message area
Wallet page shows Forest Green balance card, Terracotta Retirer button
Withdraw flow works - shows En attente status
Transactions show correct status badges (Termine/En attente)
Admin stats dashboard has 8 stat cards with colored icon backgrounds
Admin users tab works with jp-table display
Admin transactions tab shows all transactions with badges
Profile page shows gradient cover (Forest Green to Terracotta)
Profile badges (Verifie, admin) use jp-badge styles
Navigation sidebar shows JAPAP logo with MESSENGER subtitle in Terracotta
Register page uses jp-btn-primary, jp-input, jp-btn-ghost classes
